title: 🌐 AETHERMOORE/SCBE Framework - Public Website
content:
# 🌐 AETHERMOORE/SCBE Framework - Public Website

Status: Draft landing page for framework marketing
Purpose: Public-facing website for AETHERMOORE/SCBE Framework
Target Audience: AI developers, security teams, enterprise buyers
Contact: issdandavis7795@gmail.com
Header
AETHERMOORE/SCBE Framework
By Issac Davis (@davisissac) - Port Angeles, WA
A Machine-Science Control Fabric for Quantum-Resistant AI Governance
What It Is
The AETHERMOORE/SCBE Framework is a quantum-resistant machine-science control fabric for AI governance, using hyperspace tokenization, harmonic tuning, and philosophy/intent vectoring to make truth structurally low-cost and deviations high-friction.
Why It Matters
It addresses industry gaps in PQC migration, AI hallucinations, and swarm security, providing a novel synthesis of geometry, harmonics, and intent for resilient systems.
How It Works
Who It's For
AI developers
Security teams
Enterprises in finance/healthcare/defense
Innovators building distributed systems
How to Get It
Contact me below for access to specs/code, or check GitHub repos:
aethromoor-novel
Patent documentation: 🏆 SCBE-AETHERMOORE v5.0 - FINAL CONSOLIDATED PATENT APPLICATION
How to Use It
Integrate as middleware: Embed input, run layers, apply decisions for secure AI ops.
How to Build It
Start with hyperspace schema, add layers sequentially using NumPy/Torch for math, cryptography libs for PQC.
How to Test It
Use provided test suites (81/81 passing) for coherence, divergence, and quantum sims.
See: 🔬 TEST VALIDATION EVIDENCE
How to Deploy It
AWS Lambda/Python 3.11, 1024MB memory, integrate with APIs for real-time gating.
How to Scale It
Distribute swarm nodes, use entropic expansion for load balancing under attacks.
How to Secure It
Bind all ops to PQC master_secret, use fail-to-noise on failures.
How to Maintain It
Monitor coherence/drift, update invariants via harmonics tuning.
How to Update It
Iterate r_k ratios for new tuning, re-embed with phase shifts.
How to Monetize It
License as API/middleware, subscription for updates, or open-source with consulting.
How to Patent It
File provisional with USPTO, focus on bounded H and PQC binding.
Current Status: 📋 ATTORNEY FILING PACKAGE - PHASE 1
How to License It
MIT for open-source, commercial for enterprise use.
How to Market It
Pitch as "Quantum-Proof AI Guardian" on X, forums, conferences.
How to Sell It
Demo to security firms, offer POC integrations.
How to Fund It
Crowdfund on Kickstarter, seek VC for AI security, grants for quantum research.
How to Partner It
Collaborate with xAI/OpenAI for integration, crypto firms for PQC.
How to Open Source It
GitHub repo with MIT license, community contributions for layers.
How to Close Source It
Proprietary core, license for use, protect with patents.
How to Protect It
Patents, NDAs, code obfuscation with conlangs.
How to Defend It
Use vectored traps, entropic expansion against attacks.
How to Attack It
Probe with phase-shifted inputs, but quantum-proof bindings resist.
How to Break It
Exploit unbounded growth if not clamped, but v5.1 fixes this.
How to Fix It
Apply patches to invariants, re-tune harmonics.
How to Improve It
Add more dimensions, refine conlang r_k for better obfuscation.
How to Evolve It
Iterate with user feedback, add quantum sims.
How to Destroy It
Invalidate invariants, overload with high-entropy inputs.
How to Rebuild It
From specs/math, reconstruct layers starting from ground 0.
How to Reuse It
Modular layers for new apps, e.g., Shopify integration.
How to Recycle It
Repurpose code for non-AI security, like network AQM.
How to Dispose of It
Delete repos, revoke patents if open-sourced.
How to Remember It
Archive specs, math proofs in GitHub.
How to Forget It
Move on to new projects, delete local files.
Philosophy: How to Be... (Emotional Vectoring)
How to be the opposite of the opposite... (and all variations)
Explore dualities in intent vectoring, where phase shifts create opposites that resolve to unity in harmonics.
Emotional Vectoring Concepts:
Opposite states collapse to unity through phase modulation
Intent verification as harmonic resonance
Geometric truth as low-cost path in hyperspace
Deviations as high-curvature trajectories
